source_discovery_method: use configured agency/board URL and official/list endpoint where visible
detail_fetch_method: detail fetch for date/location only when fixture-backed and polite
pagination_method: respect source page controls; do not brute-force ids
canonical_url_rule: use source canonical/apply URL, absolutize relative URLs, strip tracking noise, and keep stable path identity
source_job_id_rule: url-or-title-inference: Use the stable /jobs/{id} URL segment.
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: list-payload: Preserve agency/school location fields and normalize country/region conservatively.
country_region_city_rule: list-payload: Preserve agency/school location fields and normalize country/region conservatively.
remote_type_rule: list-payload: Use explicit Remote location text only; otherwise require concrete geo-backed onsite classification.
posting_date_rule: list-payload: Public AJAX feed is one-day scoped; preserve source relative `Posted Today` evidence without inventing absolute dates.
rate_limit: strict public-board rate limit with long cooldown after 429/403

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: accepted rows must pass title/company/canonical_url/source_job_id and row-level quality gate

runner_interface.fetchDetail: detail fetch for date/location only when fixture-backed and polite
runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: run bounded read-only source estimate before any production apply
certification_blockers: production impact not yet refreshed after local source-module extraction; high existing missing normalized geo remains a live data-quality target
